$comment: Mobile Avatar Action Icon Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Avatar Action Icon — a small interactive icon that appears on top of the avatar during hover state. Supports 11 sizes (4xs–4xl), 5 color scenarios (Neutral/Primary/Success/Error/Warning), 2 background shapes (Default = rounded-rect, Circular = pill), and 4 interaction states. In Default and Disabled states the background is transparent — the colored badge only appears in Hover and Clicked states. Figma Reference: Node ID 367-6096

$component.name: Avatar Action Icon
$component.description: A small touchable icon rendered on the avatar in hover/interactive state. The icon itself is provided as a slot (defaults to chevron-down in Figma). The component's visual identity is its colored badge background: a rounded-rectangle (bg=Default) or pill (bg=Circular) shape in one of 5 scenario colors. In the Default and Disabled states, no background is shown — the icon appears bare.
$component.structure: Flex container (sizing wraps icon). Background badge appears in Hover and Clicked states only. Icon fills container.

scenario.neutral: Gray/50 background — used for general-purpose avatar actions
scenario.primary: Primary/100 background — used for primary/recommended actions
scenario.success: Success/100 background — used for positive/confirm actions
scenario.error: Error/100 background — used for destructive/delete actions
scenario.warning: Warning/100 background — used for caution actions

bg.default: Rounded rectangle background (border-radius: 4px) — square badge shape
bg.circular: Pill background (border-radius: full) — circular badge shape

state.clicked: Colored background visible (same scenario color as hover)
state.disabled: No background — icon is bare and visually muted

usage.contexts: Rendered on the Avatar component when state=Hover or state=Clicked and actionIcon=True. Also used for the Middle Action variant. Not used standalone.
usage.features: 11 icon sizes, 5 scenario colors, 2 background shapes, state-conditional background

icon.$comment: Icon container sizes per scale — matches the icon size token scale

4xs.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 4xs - 10px

3xs.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 3xs - 12px

2xs.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 2xs - 14px

xs.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for xs - 16px

sm.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for sm - 18px

md.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for md - 20px

lg.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for lg - 24px

xl.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for xl - 28px

2xl.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 2xl - 32px

3xl.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 3xl - 36px

4xl.description: Mobile avatar action icon size for 4xl - 40px

color.$comment: Icon color per scenario — applied in Hover and Clicked states. All colors are /100 tints of their respective palettes.

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state icon color - neutral/50 - #667085

disabled.description: Mobile avatar action icon disabled state icon color - neutral/50 - #667085

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state icon color - primary/100 - #004eeb

disabled.description: Mobile avatar action icon disabled state icon color - primary/100 - #004eeb

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state icon color - success/100 - #004eeb

disabled.description: Mobile avatar action icon disabled state icon color - success/100 - #004eeb

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state icon color - error/100 - #004eeb

disabled.description: Mobile avatar action icon disabled state icon color - error/100 - #004eeb

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state icon color - warning/100 - #004eeb

disabled.description: Mobile avatar action icon disabled state icon color - warning/100 - #004eeb

background.$comment: Badge background properties — background only visible in Hover and Clicked states

default.description: Mobile avatar action icon background border radius for BG=Default - 4px (rounded rectangle badge)

circular.description: Mobile avatar action icon background border radius for BG=Circular - pill (fully rounded, functionally circular)

color.$comment: Background color per scenario — applied in Hover and Clicked states. All colors are /100 tints of their respective palettes.

neutral.description: Mobile avatar action icon neutral scenario background - gray/50 - #f9fafb (lightest gray tint)

primary.description: Mobile avatar action icon primary scenario background - primary/100 - #d1e0ff

success.description: Mobile avatar action icon success scenario background - success/100 - #d1fadf

error.description: Mobile avatar action icon error scenario background - error/100 - #fee4e2

warning.description: Mobile avatar action icon warning scenario background - warning/100 - #fef0c7

background.description: Mobile avatar action icon default state background - transparent (no badge visible, bare icon only)
Mobile avatar action icon hover state - badge background visible with scenario color applied
Mobile avatar action icon clicked/pressed state - badge background visible with scenario color applied (same as hover)
Mobile avatar action icon disabled state background - transparent (no badge, icon visually muted)
